stories.title: Spurs shut down OKC in Game 4 to even series
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama set the tone from the beginning of Game 4 on Sunday as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

stories.title: Lakers hire 'rocket scientist' as assistant GM
stories.summary: The Lakers made their first significant move of the offseason by hiring Rohan Ramadas as an assistant GM under president and GM Rob Pelinka, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: UCLA tabbed top seed for NCAA baseball tourney
stories.summary: UCLA was rewarded for its dominant, wire-to-wire run through the regular season with the No. 1 seed for the NCAA tournament.

stories.title: Upstart Jodar, 19, impresses in French Open debut
stories.summary: Rafael Jodar, a 19-year-old Spaniard, continued to impress in his Roland Garros debut, dropping just five games in a 6-1, 6-0, 6-4 rout of Aleksandar Kovacevic.

stories.title: Mexican prez has 'no issue' hosting Iran WC camp
stories.summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum said Monday that she has "no issue" with her country hosting Iran's World Cup team after its training base was moved from the United States to Mexico for the summer soccer competition.
